This '''Warmaster''' was the first of three members of [[Domain Jamaane]] to be [[Warmaster]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], sometime in between the tenures of [[Yo'gand]] and [[Czulkang Lah]]. Three Warmasters were considered to be anomalously high for any single [[Domain]] to hold.

{{Char-stub}}
